opening_first_meeting.speaker: Mira
opening_first_meeting.text: You came in. It really is you.

opening_first_meeting.speaker: Mira
opening_first_meeting.text: But you are looking at me like we have never met.

opening_first_meeting.speaker: Player
opening_first_meeting.text: I only stepped inside because the lights were on.

opening_first_meeting.speaker: Player
opening_first_meeting.text: I do not recognize this place.

opening_first_meeting.speaker: Mira
opening_first_meeting.text: But not in a way I can explain all at once.

opening_first_meeting.speaker: Player
opening_first_meeting.text: I am not sure that makes me feel safer.

opening_first_meeting.speaker: Mira
opening_first_meeting.text: I know. I am trying to keep it gentle.

opening_first_meeting.speaker: Mira
opening_first_meeting.text: The room has to remember you before I am allowed to.

opening_first_meeting.speaker: Mira
opening_first_meeting.text: If I say too much too soon, it will not hold.

lost_token_quest_instruction.speaker: Mira
lost_token_quest_instruction.text: Cabinet 07 has been holding your Lost Token.

lost_token_quest_instruction.speaker: Mira
lost_token_quest_instruction.text: It kept it the way this place keeps everything.

lost_token_quest_instruction.speaker: Mira
lost_token_quest_instruction.text: A little too long, and a little too tightly.

lost_token_quest_instruction.speaker: Mira
lost_token_quest_instruction.text: Go to Cabinet Row. Win it back from the machine.

lost_token_quest_instruction.speaker: Player
lost_token_quest_instruction.text: (I walk into a closed arcade, get recognized by strangers, and immediately receive an errand. Curiosity has consequences.)

lost_token_quest_instruction.speaker: Mira
lost_token_quest_instruction.text: I would like to watch you hold something that is yours.

lost_token_active_repeat.speaker: Mira
lost_token_active_repeat.text: It only opens for signals it almost remembers.

lost_token_active_repeat.speaker: Player
lost_token_active_repeat.text: That sounds like a difficult way to recognize someone.

lost_token_active_repeat.speaker: Mira
lost_token_active_repeat.text: Around here, it counts as friendly.

lost_token_active_repeat.speaker: Mira
lost_token_active_repeat.text: If Cabinet 07 gets strange, stay calm.

lost_token_active_repeat.speaker: Mira
lost_token_active_repeat.text: It was strange before all of this too.

lost_token_active_repeat.speaker: Mira
lost_token_active_repeat.text: I promise I am not brushing you off.

lost_token_active_repeat.speaker: Mira
lost_token_active_repeat.text: Because something here still knows it belongs to you.

lost_token_return_anecdote.speaker: Mira
lost_token_return_anecdote.text: It started as a cheap counter prize. You kept it long after the ribbon faded.

lost_token_return_anecdote.speaker: Player
lost_token_return_anecdote.text: Why would that matter to me?

lost_token_return_anecdote.speaker: Mira
lost_token_return_anecdote.text: I only know one part clearly.

lost_token_return_anecdote.speaker: Mira
lost_token_return_anecdote.text: You challenged Rockbyte Duel with it and demanded a best-of-five after the cabinet won.

lost_token_return_anecdote.speaker: Mira
lost_token_return_anecdote.text: You lost that too. Then you laughed until I did.

lost_token_return_anecdote.speaker: Player
lost_token_return_anecdote.text: That sounds like someone I would like to remember.

lost_token_return_anecdote.speaker: Mira
lost_token_return_anecdote.text: The cabinet returned the token because it recognized your signal. One win did not prove a whole person.

lost_token_return_anecdote.speaker: Mira
lost_token_return_anecdote.text: It is a clue, not an answer. The others remember different pieces.

lost_token_return_anecdote.speaker: Mira
lost_token_return_anecdote.text: Start with Roxy in Cabinet Row. Her score cabinet is lying about a record.

lost_token_return_anecdote.speaker: Mira
lost_token_return_anecdote.text: She has been waiting for someone worth arguing with. Help her set it straight.

broken_high_score_transition.speaker: Mira
broken_high_score_transition.text: Cabinet Row first. Roxy's score cabinet is still lying about a record.

broken_high_score_transition.speaker: Mira
broken_high_score_transition.text: She is loud, competitive, and right about most things. Do not tell her I said that.

broken_high_score_transition.speaker: Mira
broken_high_score_transition.text: Set the board straight with her. Then Mr. Byte will want a word about truth.

truth_filter_transition.speaker: Mira
truth_filter_transition.text: Now the arcade has to decide which memories are true.

truth_filter_transition.speaker: Mira
truth_filter_transition.text: Mr. Byte can open the Truth Filter.

circuit_soda_transition.speaker: Mira
circuit_soda_transition.text: The arcade is remembering louder now.

circuit_soda_transition.speaker: Mira
circuit_soda_transition.text: I do not like how that feels in the room.

circuit_soda_transition.speaker: Mira
circuit_soda_transition.text: Vendo says fractured things still need somewhere to flow.

closing_shift_echoes_clue.speaker: Mira
closing_shift_echoes_clue.text: The final shift? I locked this counter before midnight.

closing_shift_echoes_clue.speaker: Mira
closing_shift_echoes_clue.text: After that, the night turns into noise. I wish I could tell you where to look.

closing_shift_echoes_clue.speaker: Player
closing_shift_echoes_clue.text: Something in Cabinet Row keeps pulling at me. I will start with the score board.

closing_shift_echoes_clue.speaker: Mira
closing_shift_echoes_clue.text: I do not know if it means anything. Just be gentle with yourself while you find out.

closing_shift_echoes_hint.speaker: Mira
closing_shift_echoes_hint.text: I am sorry. I still do not know what happened after I locked up.

closing_shift_echoes_hint.speaker: Player
closing_shift_echoes_hint.text: The score board is the only thread I have. I will follow that first.

overloaded_pre_staff_room.speaker: Mira
overloaded_pre_staff_room.text: You seem so far from here right now. Like part of you already walked ahead, and only the tired rest of you stayed to hear me.

overloaded_pre_staff_room.speaker: Mira
overloaded_pre_staff_room.text: I do not know how much of you I am about to lose in there. Maybe all of you. Maybe none.

overloaded_pre_staff_room.speaker: Mira
overloaded_pre_staff_room.text: When the Staff Room opens, do not rush past what it shows you.

overloaded_pre_staff_room.speaker: Mira
overloaded_pre_staff_room.text: You have survived every answer so far.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mira
post_reveal_witness.text: Employee 04.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mira
post_reveal_witness.text: I can say it now.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mira
post_reveal_witness.text: I knew you before tonight. Not as a file or an echo. As you.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mira
post_reveal_witness.text: You stayed late when everyone else wanted to leave.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mira
post_reveal_witness.text: You checked whether everyone got home.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mira
post_reveal_witness.text: You made broken cabinets feel less broken.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mira
post_reveal_witness.text: I waited because I did not know what else counted as helping.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mira
post_reveal_witness.text: I felt guilty for waiting.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mira
post_reveal_witness.text: Guilty for being relieved you came back at all, and frightened that you did not remember us.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mira
post_reveal_witness.text: For a while it was like talking to you through glass. You were here, and somewhere far off, all at once.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mira
post_reveal_witness.text: I never understood what was happening inside you before the final night. None of us did.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mira
post_reveal_witness.text: But you came back with the hard parts too.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mira
post_reveal_witness.text: You came back able to hear us, even before you understood why.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mira
post_reveal_witness.text: I am so relieved I get to know all of you again.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mira
post_reveal_witness.text: The part that dreamed of this place was not childish. It was the part willing to care.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mira
post_reveal_witness.text: The part that counted bills was not cruel. It was scared the dream would consume you.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mira
post_reveal_witness.text: Neither part could carry a whole life alone.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mira
post_reveal_witness.text: You spent years telling players that one loss was not their identity.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mira
post_reveal_witness.text: Games end cleanly. Lives keep moving after the screen goes dark.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mira
post_reveal_witness.text: A win cannot carry your whole life. A loss cannot sentence it.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mira
post_reveal_witness.text: And a young heart is not one that ignores reality. It is one that still chooses care after seeing the cost.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mira
post_reveal_witness.text: The heart of your youth was not gone. You stopped listening to it for a while.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mira
post_reveal_witness.text: You still found your way back.
